title: BGL 304 Stainless Steel Toilet Brush Long Bucket Stand Round Toilet Brush with Holder Chrome
features: Enhanced Durability: Our floor-standing toilet brush holder features a robust construction with a 304 stainless steel barrel body and handle. This not only ensures long-lasting performance but also enhances the attractive chrome color. Whether you have a smart toilet or a minimalist design, our brush holder is the perfect complement.

Dual Brush Heads: Our WC brush package includes two brush heads for effortless replacement. These brush heads boast dense 360° PP bristles, effectively removing dirt and safeguarding your bathroom from scratches. Experience a high-quality life with cleanliness and comfort.

Superior Quality: Crafted with 304 stainless steel, our brush undergoes meticulous surface treatment using electrophoresis and vacuum electroplating. This guarantees exceptional quality and durability. Additionally, it has successfully passed a rigorous 48-hour salt spray test conducted by a trusted third-party inspection company.

Innovative Holder Design: Our chrome brush holder features an internal full-length plastic container that lines the holder's interior. This intelligent design enables slow collection and drainage of any water drips from the brush head. Cleaning is a breeze as you can easily empty the accumulated water from the plastic lining.

Quality Assurance: Each standing toilet brush set is meticulously inspected by our dedicated QC team. In the unlikely event that you encounter any quality concerns with our stainless steel brush holder for bathrooms, please reach out to us without hesitation. Our professional and responsive customer service team is committed to promptly addressing your queries within the shortest possible time.
description: Product Description BGL 304 Stainless Steel Long Bucket Toilet Brush Holder ——As a brand, we believe in quality not quantity! All our durable and portable toilet brush are made to be used to its maximum and still stay for a long time. Our aim is to fully satisfy all our customers. ——This toilet brush's flexible handle has an ideal length that will give convenience for sweat-free cleaning and will not bend or break. ——The cylinder-shaped base of sturdy toilet brush kit remains sturdy each time you remove the brush to clean your toilet bowl and each time you put it back where it belongs. ——The modern toilet brush cleaner comes an ideal size that doesn't take too much bathroom space, and hide your toilet brush. ——The chrome loo brush kit is ideal for any bathroom elegant design style, which a must-have accessory for your housewares. Freestanding Toilet Brush Holder Premium Material The chrome toilet brush and holder is made of 304 stainless steel, BGL standing toilet brush with holder never succumbs to rust even in wet environment, and easier to be cleaned than plastic toilet brushes. Replaceable Brush Heads Equipped with 2 brush heads that are sturdy and durable. The head of loo brush with holder uses a flexible and strong bristles, which go deep into pipes and grooves and easily remove dead corner stains. Cover Design The lid design of the home toilet cleaning brush's handle will protect your hands from getting dirty when you wash the toilet, which effectively prevent the spread of bacteria, mold, and peculiar smell. Plastic Lined Holder Our each bathroom toilet brush set is designed with built-in a plastic container, which removable and washable. This chrome loo brush set has been designed to minimize standing water on the floor. Stable Base Our long handled toilet brush has a sealed base so that the water inside does not leak outside, which keeping your bathroom fresh and clean. Unique Bath Accessory The standing and seamless design is no external joins on the holder, providing 360° symmetry. Simple and compact design feels like a kind of decoration, which means it allows you to place it anywhere you want. Round Chrome Toilet Brush Package Including 1 x Chrome toilet brush bucket 2 x Detachable handle 2 x PP toilet brush heads 1 x 304 SUS lid Specifications - Color: Chrome-Plated - Material: 304 Stainless Steel +ABS inner bottle - Installation Method: Freestanding - Containers Size: L: 10.2 inch/ 26 cm, W: 3.15 inch/8 cm, H: 10.2 inch/26 cm - Handle Size: 14.4 inches/36.5 cm
